Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start RetornaAutorizacao.Call('WWCARTASCORRECAO', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) RetornaAutorizacao.Call('LIBERAR_CARTACORRECAO', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1, &LIBERAR_CARTACORRECAO) LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &FilCod = &Context.FilCod &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod RetornaConfSistema.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon142_LiberarAutorizacaoCCe, &TCon142_LiberarAutorizacaoCCe) if &TCon142_LiberarAutorizacaoCCe <> 'S' btnLiberar.Visible = 0 &ActionSelecione.Visible = 0 Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Grid_TitlesCategories.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFECLIRAZ' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFECLIRAZ' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFECLIRAZ' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = 'Cartas Correção' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount NfeSts.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' NfeCCeSts.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &UserUpdate = !'' &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOption) &ActionSelecione.TooltipText = "" &sdsd.Clear() &sdsd.AddItem(0, 'O que Fazer') &sdsd.AddItem(1, 'Autorizar CCe') &sdsd.AddItem(2, 'Imprimir NFe') &EnviarEmail = !'' &ImprimirDanfe = !'' Do Case Case NfeSts = Status_NFe.Autorizada NfeSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagSuccess WWColumnTagSuccessSingleCell' Case NfeSts = Status_NFe.Cancelada NfeSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell' Case NfeSts = Status_NFe.Denegada NfeSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagInfo WWColumnTagInfoSingleCell' Case NfeSts = Status_NFe.Inutilizada NfeSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell' Otherwise NfeSts.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' EndCase Do Case Case NfeCCeSts = Status_NFe.Autorizada NfeCCeSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagSuccess WWColumnTagSuccessSingleCell' Case NfeCCeSts = Status_NFe.Cancelada NfeCCeSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell' Case NfeCCeSts = Status_NFe.Denegada NfeCCeSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagInfo WWColumnTagInfoSingleCell' Case NfeCCeSts = Status_NFe.Inutilizada NfeCCeSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell' Case NfeCCeSts = Status_NFe.Importada NfeCCeSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnBold WWColumnBoldSingleCell' Otherwise NfeCCeSts.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ if NfeCCeStsLib = true or NfeCCeSts <> Status_NFe.Digitando or &TCon142_LiberarAutorizacaoCCe <> 'S' &ActionSelecione.Visible = 0 Else &ActionSelecione.Visible = 1 Endif if &IsSelecionado = true &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOption) Else &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiSelOption) EndIf EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &UserUpdate.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ UserUpdate_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event UserUpdate_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wpAddCCe.Create(EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod, NfeCCeCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event UserUpdate_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &sdsd.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &sdsd = 1 Do 'Do AutorizarCCe' Case &sdsd = 2 Do 'Do IMprimirNFe' EndCase &sdsd = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoBtnInserir' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ BtnInserir_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event BtnInserir_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wpAddCCe.Create(&EmpCod, &FiLCod, 0, 0) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event BtnInserir_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoLiberar' if &LIBERAR_CARTACORRECAO > 0 For Each Line in Grid if &IsSelecionado = true prcGravaLiberacaoCCe.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod, NfeCCeCod, true) Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndFor Refresh Else msg('Não autorizado a fazer liberação para Faturamento!') EndIf EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &NfeCliRaz1.Visible = False &NfeCliCod1.Visible = False &NfeCliCnpj1.Visible = False &NfeVlrTot1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFECLIRAZ' &NfeCliRaz1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFECLICOD' &NfeCliCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFECLICNPJ' &NfeCliCnpj1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFEVLRTOT' &NfeVlrTot1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &NfeCliRaz2.Visible = False &NfeCliCod2.Visible = False &NfeCliCnpj2.Visible = False &NfeVlrTot2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFECLIRAZ' &NfeCliRaz2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFECLICOD' &NfeCliCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFECLICNPJ' &NfeCliCnpj2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFEVLRTOT' &NfeVlrTot2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &NfeCliRaz3.Visible = False &NfeCliCod3.Visible = False &NfeCliCnpj3.Visible = False &NfeVlrTot3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFECLIRAZ' &NfeCliRaz3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFECLICOD' &NfeCliCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFECLICNPJ' &NfeCliCnpj3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFEVLRTOT' &NfeVlrTot3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFECLIRAZ' &NfeCliRaz2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFECLIRAZ' &NfeCliRaz3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do AutorizarCCe' if NfeCCeStsLib = true geraXmlAutorizacaoCCe.Call('WWCARTASCORRECAO', EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod, NfeCCeCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Else msg('Carta de Correção não Liberada para faturamento!') EndIf EndSub Sub 'Do IMprimirNFe' &NfeArqXml = RetornaXmlNota.udp(EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod) if &NfeArqXml.IsEmpty() GeraXmlNFeModelo55_4.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod, 'N', &Context.PesCod, 'E', &SolCod) EndIF GeraPdfDanfe.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod, &UrlVirtual, &UrlFisico) RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = Link(&UrlVirtual) RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"NFENUM" &NfeNum.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"NFECOD" &NfeCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FILTROFILCOD" &FiltroFilCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"NFECCEDTA" &NfeCCeDta.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) &NfeCCeDta_To.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFECLIRAZ' &NfeCliRaz1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFECLICOD' &NfeCliCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFECLICNPJ' &NfeCliCnpj1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFEVLRTOT' &NfeVlrTot1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"NFENUM", "", not &NfeNum.IsEmpty(), 0, &NfeNum.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"NFECOD", "", not &NfeCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &NfeCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FILTROFILCOD", "", not &FiltroFilCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &FiltroFilCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"NFECCEDTA", "", not (&NfeCCeDta.IsEmpty() AND &NfeCCeDta_To.IsEmpty()), 0, &NfeCCeDta.ToString().Trim(), &NfeCCeDta_To.ToString().Trim()) Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFECLIRAZ' AND not &NfeCliRaz1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeCliRaz1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFECLICOD' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeCliCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFECLICNPJ' AND not &NfeCliCnpj1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeCliCnpj1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFEVLRTOT' AND not &NfeVlrTot1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeVlrTot1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFECLIRAZ' AND not &NfeCliRaz2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeCliRaz2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFECLICOD' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeCliCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFECLICNPJ' AND not &NfeCliCnpj2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeCliCnpj2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFEVLRTOT' AND not &NfeVlrTot2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeVlrTot2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFECLIRAZ' AND not &NfeCliRaz3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeCliRaz3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFECLICOD' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeCliCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFECLICNPJ' AND not &NfeCliCnpj3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeCliCnpj3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFEVLRTOT' AND not &NfeVlrTot3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeVlrTot3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"Notas" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event &ActionSelecione.Click if &IsSelecionado = false &IsSelecionado = true Else &IsSelecionado = false Endif if &IsSelecionado = true &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOption) Else &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiSelOption) EndIf EndEvent Event &EnviarEmail.Click if NfeCCeSts = Status_NFe.Autorizada wpEnviaCce.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod, NfeCCeCod) Else msg('Carta ainda não Autorizada!') EndIF EndEvent Event &ImprimirDanfe.Click &NfeArqXml = RetornaXmlCCe.udp(EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod, NfeCCeCod) If not &NfeArqXml.IsEmpty() GeraPdfCCe.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod, NfeCCeCod, &UrlVirtual, &URlFisico) RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = Link(&UrlVirtual) RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) EndiF EndEvent

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
